comments.text: The way this problem is phrased could probably be improved ("the Ramsey number"?) and it appears the limit needs defining (is that k -> infinity?). I don't have access to the source but am working on contributing a formalization at https://github.com/google-deepmind/formal-conjectures/pull/3588 and this was raised as an issue :)

Yes, I meant that $R(k,l)$ is the off-diagonal Ramsey number defined in the usual way, and the limit should be interpreted as $k\to\infty$ (this is a common convention on this site where I just write $\lim$ if the variable in question and the endpoint is obvious from context; albeit confusing in this instance because I did write the variable but not the endpoint, I'm not sure why).
